chunks.text: Modern people live more conveniently than ever before.
But as a cost, the health of body and mind tends to be neglected.
The function of the lung weakens without exercise, and muscle diminishes if not used.
A sedentary lifestyle becomes a factor in diabetes and heart disease.
The quality of sleep is also crucial.
Staring at a smartphone screen late at night exposes the brain to intense light
Consequently, the next day's concentration drops considerably.
On the mental side, the number of people carrying anxiety and depression is increasingly growing.
The more intense the competition in society becomes, the heavier the burden.
What is necessary to maintain health is nothing special.
A thirty - minute walk each day, a balanced diet, seven hours of sleep.
And not hesitating to ask for help when in trouble.
If you move your body, your mind grows lighter.
If your mind is stable, your body will also recover.
Health is the accumulation of small daily habit.
